name: set_hierarchy
description:
Create or update a GameObject hierarchy from a text description. Matches the format of get_hierarchy output but with transform properties and components. Existing children with the same name are updated; missing ones are created. Use 'clean' to remove children not listed.

GameObject lines: '- Name key:value key:value ...', indented 2 spaces per child level.
Component lines: '+ ComponentType prop=value prop=value', indented under their parent GameObject.

World mode keys: pos:x,y,z  rot:x,y,z  scale:x,y,z  active:true/false  tag:TagName  layer:LayerName
UI mode keys: pos:x,y  size:w,h  anchor:minX,minY,maxX,maxY  pivot:x,y  rot:z  scale:x,y,z  active:true/false

Component properties use '=' (not ':') to separate key and value. Use quotes for values with spaces: prop="my value".
For scene object references, prefix with '@': target=@OtherGameObject or target=@OtherGameObject.ComponentType.
References are resolved after all objects are created, so forward references within the hierarchy work.

All keys are optional — omitted keys keep current values (existing objects) or use defaults (new objects).

Example (world with components):
- Enemies
  - Slime pos:0,0,0 tag:Enemy
    + Rigidbody mass=2 drag=0.5
    + BoxCollider size=1,1,1
    + EnemyController health=100 speed=3.5 target=@Player
  - Bat pos:5,3,0 tag:Enemy
    + Rigidbody mass=0.5 useGravity=false
    + SphereCollider radius=0.5

Example (ui, root: 'Canvas'):
- HUD anchor:0,0,1,1
  - HealthBar pos:-100,30 size:200,20 anchor:0,1,0,1 pivot:0,1
    + Image color=1,0,0,1
    + Slider value=1 minValue=0 maxValue=1
  - ScoreText pos:100,30 size:150,20
    + TextMeshProUGUI text="Score: 0" fontSize=24 color=1,1,1,1

hierarchy.description: The hierarchy definition. GameObject lines start with '- Name' (after indentation) with optional key:value pairs for transforms. Component lines start with '+ ComponentType' with optional prop=value pairs. Indent 2 spaces per depth level. Use @GameObjectName for scene object references in component properties.

root.description: Optional. Parent GameObject under which the hierarchy is applied. If omitted, applies at scene root.

mode.description: Transform mode. 'world' (default): pos/rot/scale on Transform. 'ui': pos/size/anchor/pivot on RectTransform.

clean.description: Optional (default false). When true, destroys children of root (and each sub-parent) that are NOT listed in the hierarchy. Undoable.
